stemHtml: If the reported RVR is below that required for the take-off minima, the take-off...

options.b: can be commenced provided the commander can determine that the visibility along the take-off runway is equal to or better than the required minimum.
options.c: can be commenced provided the commander cancels the IFR flight plan.
options.d: can be commenced provided a suitable take-off alternate aerodrome is available.
